title: Drothrock
compiled_truth: Drothrock is an external contact at [Cmta](companies/cmta). Over the corpus period (2000-08-10 to 2001-12-21), Drothrock sent 18 and received 189 emails, totalling 207 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (18), [Wbooth](people/wbooth-booth-law) (3), [Elsesser Evelyn](people/elsesser-evelyn) (2), [Kaye Loren](people/kaye-loren) (2), [Kmccrea](people/kmccrea-sablaw) (1).
